description_long: This rifle features a compact, utilitarian design with a cylindrical main body and a prominent barrel extending from both ends. The upper section includes a simple, tubular sighting device, while the lower section is equipped with a straight, vertical pistol grip for handling. The overall form is blocky and minimalistic, with no visible stock or extended magazine, suggesting a lightweight, possibly submachine gun-inspired weapon. The surface is uniformly dark gray, with a matte finish that reduces glare and reflection. The construction appears to be primarily metal, giving it a robust and durable appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, blocky rifle with a cylindrical barrel, vertical pistol grip, and a simple tubular sight, finished in matte dark gray metal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the pistol grip, and the tubular sight on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the sight above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with the barrel, grip, and sight visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the main body and the end of the sight, with the grip extending downward.
